meta.description: Polls the ClipForge Google Sheet for rows where status=ready, fans each row's 3 role-variants (narator/comentator/povestitor) out to the mapped TikTok accounts via the Upload-Post API, then marks each row posted/error. TikTok-only v1. Edit ACCOUNT_MAP in the 'Build post jobs' node. Sheet headers: NR | LINK | TRANSCRIPT | DESCRIERE | narator_url | comentator_url | povestitor_url | status. Rows are matched on NR.
